name: Fringe Benefit Withholding Exclusion

eligibility.description: Employers providing qualified non-cash fringe benefits to employees.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes from withholding any benefit provided to an employee that is reasonably believed to be excludable under sections 117 (scholarships) or 132 (working condition fringes, de minimis fringes, etc.).
